comments.original: Interesting take there! But isn't history—with all its layers—a formidable element that cements a place as ‘home’? Even amid changes, some rooted aspects always strike me more deeply than any modern vibe ever can.
comments.anonymized: Interesting take there! But isn't history—with all its layers—a formidable element that cements a place as ‘home’? Even amid changes, some rooted aspects always strike me more deeply than any modern vibe ever can.
